items.title: Build an AI-powered F1 analytics agent with McLaren RacingAug 18In this hands-on workshop, you'll get behind the wheel and build a Race Intelligence Platform for McLaren Racing. You'll get hands-on with three tiers of Google Cloud's GenAI stack—Gemini Enterprise, Agent Designer, and the Agent Development Kit (ADK)—to build a system that can answer questions, synthesize briefings, and run complex computations. Ready to stop guessing and start computing? Sign up to build a data-driven reasoning engine that can keep pace with Formula 1.Online3 hr
